title: The Complete Bible (KJV)
description: The complete King James Version of the Bible as readable written books in Minecraft.
body:
![The Complete Bible (King James Version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b58b07195e8f68ce457d62da95e2f7c4e8212db.jpeg)# The Complete Holy Bible (KJV)

**The complete King James Version Bible as readable written books in Minecraft.**

---

## Overview

Experience the entire Holy Bible in Minecraft! This datapack contains all **66 books**, **1,189 chapters**, and **31,102 verses** of the King James Version, formatted as readable written books you can hold, read, and store in your world.

I created a discord for anybody willing to help proof read or if any errors are found. https://discord.gg/EjgYfwW3er

Or Email AaronKylePorche@gmail.com

---

## What You Get

- **353 written books** (longer books are split into volumes)
- **16 shulker boxes** organized in 1 chest
- **Brown shulkers** - Old Testament (39 books)
- **Purple shulkers** - New Testament (27 books)

Each book includes:
- Title page with book name and chapter range
- Chapter headers for easy navigation
- Every verse numbered and readable

---

## How to Use

1. Download and extract the zip folder. 
2. Place the folder in your world's `datapacks` folder
3. In-game, run: `/reload`
4. Run: `/function bible:placebible`
5. A chest will appear in front of you containing all the books!

---

## Shulker Organization

### Old Testament (Brown Shulkers)
Genesis through Malachi - 39 books across 10 shulkers

### New Testament (Purple Shulkers)
Matthew through Revelation - 27 books across 6 shulkers

---

## Translation

**King James Version (KJV)**

The King James Version is in the public domain and may be freely used.

---

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21+
- **Pack Format:** 48
